'''Pqweeduk''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]. He was the son of [[Greedo the Elder]] and [[Neela]] and the younger brother of [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]. After her husband was murdered by [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red]] during the clan purges, Neela fled [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] with her then-two-year-old son, along with other members of her family and [[Tetsu Clan|Tetsu clan]]. In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], Pqweeduk and Greedo discovered three old Rodian starships in the caves of their homeworld, [[U-Tendik]].<ref name="A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale webstrip" /> Later that night, Navik and [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza Clan]] members found the refugees and slaughtered them. Neela was able to escape with Pqweeduk and Greedo. Pqweeduk was later killed on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].
